value.name: ECA-Net
value.full_name: ECA-Net: 高效通道注意力网络
value.description: ECA-Net是一种高效通道注意力网络，通过轻量级的注意力机制提升网络性能。该方法使用一维卷积自适应地确定通道注意力的覆盖范围，避免了SE-Net中全连接层带来的参数开销。
value.paper_title: Detection and Tracking Meet Drones Challenge

value.name: UA-CMDet
value.full_name: UA-CMDet: 不确定感知双光目标检测网络
value.description: UA-CMDet是一种不确定感知双光目标检测网络，用于RGB-T多模态目标检测。该方法通过不确定性建模，有效提升了跨模态融合的鲁棒性。
value.paper_title: Drone-Based RGB-Infrared Cross-Modality Vehicle Detection via Uncertainty-Aware Learning

value.name: STNNet
value.full_name: STNNet: 时空近邻网络
value.description: STNNet是一种时空近邻网络，用于检测、追踪和计数多任务学习。该方法通过时空建模和近邻关联机制，实现了高效的人群分析。
value.paper_title: Detection, Tracking, and Counting Meets Drones in Crowds: A Benchmark

value.name: TC-MoA
value.full_name: TC-MoA: 任务自适应的混合Adapter网络
value.description: TC-MoA是一种任务自适应的混合Adapter网络，用于通用图像融合。该方法针对不同融合任务自动选择合适的适配器。
value.paper_title: Task-Customized Mixture of Adapters for General Image Fusion

value.name: BAT
value.full_name: BAT: 双向适配器多模态跟踪
value.description: Bi-directional Adapter for Multi-modal Tracking。该方法通过双向适配器实现高效的多模态目标跟踪。
value.paper_title: Bi-directional Adapter for Multi-modal Tracking

value.name: MoE-Fusion
value.full_name: Multi-modal Gated Mixture of Local-to-Global Experts for Dynamic Image Fusion
value.description: 动态图像融合框架，采用多模态门控混合局部到全局专家(MoE)架构。MoLE执行多模态局部特征的专门学习，MoGE专注于全局信息，通过局部到全局动态学习范式保留多模态图像纹理和对比度。
value.task: 红外与可见光图像融合
value.paper_title: Multi-modal Gated Mixture of Local-to-Global Experts for Dynamic Image Fusion

value.name: ASNet
value.full_name: ASNet: 智能体共享网络
value.description: ASNet是一种智能体共享网络，用于多无人机单目标跟踪任务。该方法通过智能体间信息共享机制，提升了多机协同跟踪的鲁棒性和准确性。
value.paper_title: Multi-Drone-Based Single Object Tracking With Agent Sharing Network

value.name: GCP-OPT
value.full_name: Towards A Deeper Understanding of Global Covariance Pooling in Deep Learning
value.description: 从优化视角深入理解深度学习中的全局协方差池化(GCP)。研究表明GCP可以改善优化损失的李普希茨连续性，实现更平坦的局部极小值，同时改善梯度预测性并作为梯度的特殊预条件器。
value.paper_title: Towards A Deeper Understanding of Global Covariance Pooling in Deep Learning: An Optimization Perspective

value.name: MP+
value.full_name: Tuning Pre-trained Model via Moment Probing
value.description: 一种高效的预训练模型微调方法，通过对特征分布表征执行线性分类器来高效微调预训练视觉骨干网络。提出部分共享模块学习两个重校准参数(PSRP)，形成完整的微调框架MP+。
value.paper_title: Tuning Pre-trained Model via Moment Probing

value.name: MIA-NET
value.full_name: MIA-NET: 多无人机多目标跟踪网络
value.description: MIA-NET是一种多无人机多目标跟踪网络，用于解决目标遮挡问题。该方法通过多机协同感知，有效提升遮挡场景下的跟踪性能。
value.paper_title: Robust Multi-Drone Multi-Target Tracking to Resolve Target Occlusion: A Benchmark

value.name: SR-TOD
value.full_name: SR-TOD: 差异图小目标检测
value.description: Visible and Clear: Finding Tiny Objects in Difference Map。该方法通过差异图分析实现高效的小目标检测。
value.paper_title: Visible and Clear: Finding Tiny Objects in Difference Map

value.name: OpenMix+
value.full_name: Revisiting Data Augmentation for Open Set Recognition
value.description: 开放集识别数据增强策略。提出开放集识别需要在分类和未知检测之间取得平衡的新视角，设计了OpenMixup、OpenCutout、OpenCutmix三种数据增强方法提升未知检测性能。
value.paper_title: OpenMix+: Revisiting Data Augmentation for Open Set Recognition

value.name: DetFusion
value.full_name: DetFusion: A Detection-driven Infrared and Visible Image Fusion Network
value.description: 检测驱动的红外与可见光图像融合网络。该方法将目标检测任务与图像融合相结合，生成更适合下游检测任务的融合图像。
value.task: 红外与可见光图像融合
value.paper_title: DetFusion: A Detection-driven Infrared and Visible Image Fusion Network

value.name: TransMDOT
value.full_name: Cross-Drone Transformer Network for Robust Single Object Tracking
value.description: 跨无人机Transformer网络用于鲁棒单目标跟踪。该方法利用Transformer架构实现跨无人机的目标跟踪，有效处理视角变化和遮挡问题。
value.paper_title: Cross-Drone Transformer Network for Robust Single Object Tracking

value.name: HybridSupSeg
value.full_name: Hybrid Supervised Segmentation with Point Supervision
value.description: 混合监督分割方法，结合点监督和图像级监督进行语义分割。该方法在弱监督条件下实现精确的图像分割。
value.paper_title: Hybrid Supervised Segmentation with Point Supervision

value.name: SLRNet
value.full_name: Sign Language Recognition Network with Multi-modal Fusion
value.description: 多模态融合手语识别网络。该方法通过多模态信息融合提升手语识别精度。
value.paper_title: Sign Language Recognition with Multi-modal Fusion

value.name: ACA-GAN
value.full_name: Autoencoder-based Collaborative Attention GAN for Multi-modal Image Synthesis
value.description: 基于自编码器的协同注意力GAN用于多模态图像合成。该方法通过协同注意力机制实现多模态信息融合，支持医学图像、人脸图像等多模态合成任务。
value.paper_title: Autoencoder-based Collaborative Attention GAN for Multi-modal Image Synthesis

value.name: TG-ECNet
value.full_name: TG-ECNet: 任务门控多专家协作网络
value.description: TG-ECNet (Task-gated Multi-expert Collaboration Network) 是一种任务门控多专家协作网络，用于退化多模态图像融合。
value.paper_title: Task-gated Multi-expert Collaboration Network for Degraded Multi-modal Image Fusion

value.name: PReNet
value.full_name: Progressive Recurrent Network for Image Deraining
value.description: 用于图像去雨的渐进循环网络。该方法通过渐进式循环结构实现高效的图像去雨。
value.paper_title: Progressive Image Deraining Networks: A Better and Simpler Baseline

value.name: CMPD
value.full_name: Cross-Modal Pedestrian Detection with Adaptive Fusion
value.description: 自适应融合跨模态行人检测。该方法通过自适应融合策略提升多光谱行人检测性能。
value.paper_title: Cross-Modal Pedestrian Detection with Adaptive Fusion

value.name: SMPD
value.full_name: Stabilizing Multispectral Pedestrian Detection with Evidential Hybrid Fusion
value.description: 基于证据混合融合的多光谱行人检测稳定方法。这是首个基于MindSpore的多光谱行人检测完整实现，提供全面的检测流程。
value.paper_title: Stabilizing Multispectral Pedestrian Detection with Evidential Hybrid Fusion

value.name: IRC
value.full_name: Infrared Reconstruction Cross-modality for Pedestrian Detection
value.description: 跨模态红外重建用于行人检测。该方法通过红外图像重建提升跨模态行人检测性能。
value.paper_title: Infrared Reconstruction Cross-modality for Pedestrian Detection

value.name: MGECL
value.full_name: Multi-Granularity Embedding Clustering for Lifelong Learning
value.description: 多粒度嵌入聚类用于终身学习。该方法通过多粒度嵌入表示实现高效的终身学习。
value.paper_title: Multi-Granularity Embedding Clustering for Lifelong Learning

value.name: RecDerain
value.full_name: Single Image Deraining Using Bilateral Recurrent Network
value.description: 双边循环网络图像去雨方法。该方法通过双边LSTMs允许雨纹层和背景图像层之间的交互，同时利用两个循环网络分别处理雨纹和背景特征，实现有效的单图像去雨。
value.paper_title: Single Image Deraining Using Bilateral Recurrent Network

value.name: MvKE-FC
value.full_name: Multi-view Knowledge Ensemble with Frequency Consistency for Face Cross-Domain Translation
value.description: 多视图知识集成与频率一致性用于人脸跨域转换。该方法通过频率一致性约束实现多视图知识的有效集成，支持人脸图像的跨域转换任务。
value.paper_title: Multi-view Knowledge Ensemble with Frequency Consistency for Face Cross-Domain Translation

value.name: BackMix
value.full_name: BackMix: 开放集识别正则化方法
value.description: BackMix 是一种通过移除潜在前景-背景先验来正则化开放集识别的方法，有效提升模型对未知类别的识别能力。
value.paper_title: BackMix: Regularizing Open Set Recognition by Removing Underlying Fore-Background Priors

value.name: CMEDFL
value.full_name: Cross-Modal Expert Distillation Framework for Lifelong Learning
value.description: 跨模态专家蒸馏终身学习框架。该方法通过跨模态知识蒸馏实现高效的终身学习，有效解决灾难性遗忘问题。
value.paper_title: Cross-Modal Expert Distillation Framework for Lifelong Learning

value.name: 3G-Net
value.full_name: 3D Geometry Graph Network for Point Cloud Processing
value.description: 用于点云处理的三维几何图网络。该方法通过几何感知图结构处理三维点云数据。
value.paper_title: 3D Geometry Graph Network for Point Cloud Processing

value.name: CCF
value.full_name: CCF: Conditional Controllable Image Fusion
value.description: Conditional Controllable Image Fusion (NeurIPS 2024)。该方法通过条件控制实现灵活的图像融合。
value.paper_title: Conditional Controllable Image Fusion

value.name: LHGN
value.full_name: Local Hypergraph Network for Multi-View Clustering
value.description: 局部超图网络用于多视图聚类。该方法通过构建局部超图结构挖掘多视图数据中的复杂关系。
value.paper_title: Local Hypergraph Network for Multi-View Clustering

value.name: EMA-Crowd
value.full_name: EMA-Crowd: 高效掩码自编码器人群计数网络
value.description: EMA-Crowd是一种基于高效掩码自编码器的人群计数网络，用于从无人机视角进行人群密度估计和计数。
value.paper_title: Efficient Masked AutoEncoder for Video Object Counting and A Large-Scale Benchmark

value.name: DomainAdapt
value.full_name: Domain Adaptation for Visual Recognition
value.description: 视觉识别领域的域适应方法。该方法通过对抗学习和特征对齐技术实现跨域知识迁移。
value.paper_title: Domain Adaptation for Visual Recognition

value.name: SSID-KD
value.full_name: Semantic Self-Interest Distillation for Knowledge Distillation
value.description: 基于语义自兴趣蒸馏的知识蒸馏方法。该方法通过挖掘学生模型的自兴趣特征提升知识蒸馏效果。
value.paper_title: Semantic Self-Interest Distillation for Knowledge Distillation

value.name: DyFSS
value.full_name: DyFSS: Dynamically Fusing Self-Supervised Tasks
value.description: Every Node is Different: Dynamically Fusing Self-Supervised Tasks for Attributed Graph Clustering (AAAI 2024)。该方法通过动态融合自监督任务实现属性图聚类。
value.paper_title: Every Node is Different: Dynamically Fusing Self-Supervised Tasks for Attributed Graph Clustering

value.name: CDRS
value.full_name: Cross-Domain Representation Learning for Person Re-identification
value.description: 跨域表示学习用于行人重识别。该方法通过跨域学习提升行人重识别的泛化能力。
value.paper_title: Cross-Domain Representation Learning for Person Re-identification

value.name: R2SQL
value.full_name: Dynamic Hybrid Relation Network for Cross-Domain Context-Dependent Semantic Parsing
value.description: 动态混合关系网络用于跨域上下文相关语义解析。该方法通过动态混合关系建模提升文本到SQL的跨域解析能力。
value.paper_title: Dynamic Hybrid Relation Network for Cross-Domain Context-Dependent Semantic Parsing

value.name: PsHD
value.full_name: PsHD: 持续同调蒸馏半监督持续学习
value.description: Persistence Homology Distillation for Semi-supervised Continual Learning (NeurIPS 2024)。该方法通过持续同调蒸馏实现高效的半监督持续学习。
value.paper_title: Persistence Homology Distillation for Semi-supervised Continual Learning

value.name: BA-Fusion
value.full_name: BA-Fusion: 动态亮度自适应多模态图像融合
value.description: Dynamic Brightness Adaptation for Robust Multi-modal Image Fusion (IJCAI 2024)。该方法通过动态亮度自适应实现鲁棒的多模态图像融合。
value.paper_title: Dynamic Brightness Adaptation for Robust Multi-modal Image Fusion

value.name: M2AENet
value.full_name: M2AENet: 运动感知自适应像素剪枝网络
value.description: M2AENet (Motion-Aware Adaptive Pixel Pruning) 是一种运动感知自适应像素剪枝方法，用于高效局部运动去模糊。
value.paper_title: Motion-Aware Adaptive Pixel Pruning for Efficient Local Motion Deblurring

value.name: M-RRFS
value.full_name: M-RRFS: Memory-based Robust Region Feature Synthesizer
value.description: M-RRFS: A Memory-based Robust Region Feature Synthesizer for Zero-Shot Object Detection (IJCV 2024)。该方法通过记忆机制实现零样本目标检测。
value.paper_title: M-RRFS: A Memory-based Robust Region Feature Synthesizer for Zero-Shot Object Detection

value.name: SL
value.full_name: SL: Socialized Learning
value.description: Socialized Learning: Making Each Other Better Through Multi-Agent Collaboration (ICML 2024)。该方法通过多智能体协作实现社会化学习。
value.paper_title: Socialized Learning: Making Each Other Better Through Multi-Agent Collaboration

value.name: CCP-GNN
value.full_name: CCP-GNN: Competitive Covariance Pooling for Graph Neural Networks
value.description: CCP-GNN: Competitive Covariance Pooling for Improving Graph Neural Networks (IEEE TNNLS 2024)。该方法通过竞争性协方差池化提升图神经网络性能。
value.paper_title: CCP-GNN: Competitive Covariance Pooling for Improving Graph Neural Networks

value.name: ARM
value.full_name: ARM: 非对称强化对抗多模态表征偏差
value.description: ARM (Asymmetric Reinforcing against Multi-modal Representation Bias) 是一种非对称强化方法，用于解决多模态表征偏差问题。
value.paper_title: Asymmetric Reinforcing against Multi-modal Representation Bias

value.name: DSGD
value.full_name: DSGD: 动态子图蒸馏半监督持续学习
value.description: Dynamic Sub-graph Distillation for Robust Semi-supervised Continual Learning (AAAI 2024)。该方法通过动态子图蒸馏实现鲁棒的半监督持续学习。
value.paper_title: Dynamic Sub-graph Distillation for Robust Semi-supervised Continual Learning

value.name: GSIP
value.full_name: GSIP: Graph Class Incremental Learning
value.description: What Matters in Graph Class Incremental Learning? An Information Preservation Perspective (NeurIPS 2024)。该方法通过信息保存视角研究图类增量学习。
value.paper_title: What Matters in Graph Class Incremental Learning? An Information Preservation Perspective

value.name: IHGAT
value.full_name: IHGAT: Integrated Heterogeneous Graph Attention Network
value.description: Integrated Heterogeneous Graph Attention Network for Incomplete Multi-modal Clustering (IJCV 2024)。该方法通过异构图注意力网络处理不完整多模态聚类。
value.paper_title: Integrated Heterogeneous Graph Attention Network for Incomplete Multi-modal Clustering

value.name: GHG
value.full_name: GHG: 多智能体图社交学习
value.description: Graphs Help Graphs (GHG) 是一种多智能体图社交学习框架，用于图学习任务。该方法通过智能体间的图结构信息共享，提升了分布式学习的性能。
value.paper_title: Graphs Help Graphs: Multi-Agent Graph Socialized Learning

value.name: MTCP
value.full_name: MTCP: 多任务可信伪标签学习网络
value.description: MTCP是一种多任务可信伪标签学习网络，用于半监督人群计数。该方法通过可信度评估和伪标签筛选，提升了半监督学习效果。
value.paper_title: Multi-Task Credible Pseudo-Label Learning for Semi-supervised Crowd Counting

value.name: TEDFuse
value.full_name: TEDFuse: 三边引导的图像融合网络
value.description: TEDFuse 是一种三边引导的图像融合网络，用于红外与可见光图像融合。该方法通过三边卷积引导，提取多尺度特征进行图像融合。
value.paper_title: Trilateral-Convolutional Guided Infrared and Visible Image Fusion

value.name: CKD
value.full_name: CKD: 样本级对比知识蒸馏
value.description: CKD (Contrastive Knowledge Distillation) 是一种样本级对比知识蒸馏方法，用于模型压缩和知识迁移。
value.paper_title: CKD: Contrastive Knowledge Distillation from A Sample-Wise Perspective

value.name: RTF
value.full_name: RTF: 递归输注多模态图像合成
value.description: RTF (Recursive Transfusion) 是一种递归输注方法，用于多模态图像合成任务。
value.paper_title: RTF: Recursive Transfusion for Multi-modal Image Synthesis

value.name: PLCSR
value.full_name: PLCSR: Pseudo Labeling with Curriculum Self-Reflexion
value.description: Boosting Pseudo Labeling with Curriculum Self-Reflexion for Attributed Graph Clustering (IEEE TNNLS 2024)。该方法通过课程自反思提升属性图聚类的伪标签质量。
value.paper_title: Boosting Pseudo Labeling with Curriculum Self-Reflexion for Attributed Graph Clustering

value.name: MvDSCN
value.full_name: MvDSCN: 多视图深度子空间聚类网络
value.description: MvDSCN是一种多视图深度子空间聚类网络，用于多视图聚类任务。
value.paper_title: MvDSCN

value.name: SC
value.full_name: SC: 社会化协同进化
value.description: SC (Socialized Coevolution) 是一种社会化协同进化方法，通过跨任务协作来推进更好的世界。
value.paper_title: Socialized Coevolution: Advancing a Better World through Cross-Task Collaboration

value.name: DMPO
value.full_name: DMPO: 解耦多预测器优化
value.description: DMPO (Decoupled Multi-Predictor Optimization) 是一种解耦多预测器优化方法，用于推理高效的模型调优。
value.paper_title: Decoupled Multi-Predictor Optimization for Inference-Efficient Model Tuning

value.name: Multimodal-NL
value.full_name: Multimodal-NL: 多模态负学习
value.description: Multimodal Negative Learning (Multimodal-NL) 是一种多模态负学习框架，用于多模态学习任务。该方法通过挖掘多模态数据中的负样本信息，提升模型的泛化能力。
value.paper_title: Multimodal Negative Learning
